name: bmad-planning-orchestrator
description: A Claude Code planning & orchestration harness for the BMAD Method by the BMAD Code Organization (https://github.com/bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD). Facilitates the BMAD planning lifecycle — brainstorm, research, product brief, SPEC, PRD, UX, architecture, epics & stories — then orchestrates conflict-free, dependency-ordered PARALLEL workstreams and hands ready-for-dev stories off to your dev tools. It plans and orchestrates; it never writes the code.

outputFolder.title: Output folder
outputFolder.description: Directory (relative to your project) where BMAD planning artifacts are written.

defaultTrack.title: Default scale-adaptive track
defaultTrack.description: Preferred planning track when not chosen interactively: quick-flow, bmad-method, or enterprise. Leave blank to always choose interactively.

maxParallel.title: Max parallel workstreams
maxParallel.description: Default maximum number of stories planned to run concurrently in a parallel wave (your dev tool enforces the actual concurrency).
